translation.name: Sebastian Bożek.
translation.brief_desc: I am designing and creating apps.
translation.full_desc: I am a software engineering graduate and I am passionate about creating applications that can be useful for everyone! Currently I am looking for new opportunities and challenges, still developing my skills, focusing on React and Next.js.
translation.christmas-description: That's a descirption for christmas project
translation.mobilewarehouse-description: That's a descirption for mobile warehouse project
translation.britenetDescription:
- Developed a responsive web application using React Next.js, Firebase, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript and Shadcn/UI
- Leveraged server-side rendering with Next.js to optimize data integration from Firebase, significantly improving load times and decreasing number of queries
- Architected complex routing solutions using the Next.js App Router and Middleware, enabling dynamic, route-specific content delivery
- Utilized advanced React techniques, such as hook management, render props, suspense and lazy loading
translation.epamDescription:
- Contributed to projects by developing additional features using advanced .NET technologies such as Entity Framework, LINQ, SOLID architecture and OOP
- Use of Dependency Injection and custom Middleware to enhance architecture
- Implemented three-layer architecture, focusing on separation of concerns and optimizing data access and business logic layers
translation.fivemDescription:
- Designing and creating scripts for FiveM platform using LUA, JS and QBCore Framework
- Implementation of middleware and event-driven architecture for asynchronous operations handling
- Managing robust client-server networking and database interactions using relational database
translation.saraDescription:
- Development and implementation of a 3D open-world RPG game using the Unity engine
- Programming AI and physics systems using Rigidbody, as well as creating custom scriptable objects for modular game features
- Performance optimization using advanced optimization techniques such as Level of Details (LOD) and occlusion culling
- Participation in several months of workshops focused on C# and Unity programming
translation.project1Description: As part of a five-person team supervised by senior developers, we built an application similar in functionality to Jira. It enables project tracking, task management, and assignment to team members. Powered by AI and featuring a dynamic, interactive user interface, the app makes managing your projects easy and enjoyable.
translation.project2Description: This project is part of my engineering thesis, done as a team of three. It includes a mobile app, a web app, and a backend. The system helps track a fleet of trucks, makes communication between carriers and logistics managers easier, and helps organize routes for them.
translation.project4Description: This calculator helps you track your progress while grinding in Black Desert Online. It lets you easily analyze your profits and losses during long sessions, so you can forget about messy Excel spreadsheets. It does all the work for you and shows you the data you actually need.
translation.project5Description: This is an advent calendar that helps you randomly pick the perfect song or movie for each day leading up to the end of December! Smooth animations and a polished interface add to the fun and excitement of opening each new window.
translation.vjournal1: As part of a five-person team supervised by senior developers, we built an application similar in functionality to Jira. It enables project tracking, task management, and assignment to team members. Powered by AI and featuring a dynamic, interactive user interface, the app makes managing your projects easy and enjoyable.
translation.vjournal2: We built the app using modern technologies like Next.js, Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui to ensure fast performance and a clean, responsive design. For the backend, we used Firebase as our main database solution and integrated additional libraries to support real-time updates, form validation, and accessibility - creating a seamless experience for both users and developers.
translation.vjournal3: On the backend side, we implemented advanced features including authentication, authorization and structured data management. We leveraged Tanstack react query to handle efficient data fetchning, caching and synchronization with the servers, ensuring smooth state handling across the application. The system architecture was designed with scalability and modularity in mind, making future development and maintenance straightforward.
translation.vjournal4: One of the app's standout features is its integration with ChatGPT, which helps users generate detailed tasks from short, natural-language inputs. Combined with a mobile-first interface approach, the app adapts efortlessly to any screen size and keeps the user experience intuitive and engaging, expecially on the go.
translation.mobilestorage1: This project is part of my engineering thesis, done as a team of three. It includes a mobile app, a web app, and a backend. The system helps track a fleet of trucks, makes communication between carriers and logistics managers easier, and helps organize routes for them.
translation.mobilestorage2: The whole system was created using Java, React, and MySQL, with the help of Android Studio for the mobile app. We ensured smooth communication between the frontend and backend, providing reliable data fetching and seamless interaction.
translation.mobilestorage3: The mobile app allowed fast and efficient communication between logistics managers and carriers, speeding up much of the work needed to prepare the required reports. It also featured robust authentication and permission controls, ensuring secure access and protecting sensitive data.
translation.bdo1: This calculator helps you track your progress while grinding in Black Desert Online. It lets you easily analyze your profits and losses during long sessions, so you can forget about messy Excel spreadsheets. It does all the work for you and shows you the data you actually need.
translation.bdo2: The app was created entirely as a desktop application using the .NET Framework. It was my first project that introduced me to the world of programming.
translation.christmascalendar1: This is an advent calendar that helps you pick the perfect song or movie for each day until the end of December! Added animations and a polished interface boost the excitement and fun of opening each window.
translation.christmascalendar2: It was built using Next.js with MongoDB and shadcn/ui, following a mobile-first approach. This modern setup allows for quick data retrieval by storing information locally, while the selections are randomly drawn from a server-side pool. The interactive design features animations and is deployed using Vercel.
